steps.title: Find the singular subject
steps.content: The subject is Tracy Fullerton's Walden, a game, one game. The appositive does not change that number.

steps.title: Match the verb form
steps.content: Choice B — invite; Choice C — are inviting; and Choice D — have invited; all are plural verb forms. The sentence needs a singular verb agreeing with the singular subject. The answer is A.
